name: 0xarchive
description: Agent-ready 0xArchive market data skill for coding-agent clients across Hyperliquid and Lighter.xyz, including Hyperliquid HIP-3 builder perps, HIP-4 outcome markets, and Hyperliquid Spot. Covers historical REST endpoints plus realtime WebSocket channels (trades, liquidations, orderbooks, spot channels, HIP-4 channels, L4 order-level data, TWAP, outcome_settled).
